value:
I understand how frustrating this must be, especially since your earlier orders arrived at the same address without issue. It's concerning that the courier hasn't been able to locate your home or respond to your calls. Let me help get this sorted for you.

Could you please share your order number so I can reach out to the courier service directly on your behalf and understand what's happened? Once I have that, I'll escalate this to ensure they contact you immediately and locate your address—there may be a specific delivery instruction or contact detail that needs to be updated on their end. We'll make sure this gets resolved quickly.
